text.title: llamaindex-ingestion-pipeline Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 high-impact failure modes for llamaindex-ingestion-pipeline with detectors and fixes that map back to rules in 01-core-rules.xml.

antipattern.symptom: Every deploy re-embeds the whole corpus
antipattern.root-cause: Docstore not configured; no doc-hash dedup.
antipattern.fix: Use IngestionPipeline(docstore=SimpleDocumentStore()) and persist alongside vector store.
antipattern.detector: Re-run ingestion on unchanged corpus; cost should be near zero.

antipattern.symptom: SemanticSplitter produces 10k tiny nodes from a structured doc
antipattern.root-cause: Wrong splitter for the doc shape (semantic on a list).
antipattern.fix: Use SentenceSplitter for structured/repetitive content; reserve SemanticSplitter for narrative.

antipattern.symptom: TitleExtractor runs slowly because it calls an LLM per doc
antipattern.fix: Set num_workers in IngestionPipeline; batch metadata extraction.
antipattern.detector: Profile per-doc time; should drop ~Nx with workers.

antipattern.symptom: Vector store inflates by 10× after refactor
antipattern.root-cause: Docstore IDs changed; same doc re-embedded under new id.
antipattern.fix: Hash content body, not path; preserve doc_id across refactors.
antipattern.detector: Index size before/after refactor; should be ~equal.
